welcome.name_prompt: But we don't know your name yet.

phone.headline: What's your number?
phone.body: We'll send a code. Takes two seconds.
phone.verified_body: Your number's locked in. One less thing.
phone.consent_text: I agree to receive messages from Mingla via SMS or phone call, including verification codes, friend invitations, and experience reminders. Reply STOP to opt out or HELP for help. See our
phone.consent_accessibility: Agree to receive messages from Mingla

otp.headline: Enter the code
otp.channel_label: Didn't get it? Try another way:
otp.error_max_attempts: Three tries, no luck. Try a different method below.
otp.error_wrong_code: That code didn't land. Try again.

gender.headline: Tell us about you.
gender.body: So we can get your picks right.

details.headline: Almost done.
details.body: Just the basics. We'll handle the rest.
details.country_helper: Sets your currency and units of measurement

value_prop.beat2_sub: Plans for every kind of outing.

intents.headline: Now the fun part.
intents.body: Tap every vibe that sounds like you.
intents.caption: Pick the one that excites you most.

location.settings_body:
Location is off for Mingla.
Turn it on in Settings so we can find
the best spots near you.
location.error_body:
Weak signal or GPS still warming up.
Try again or type your city instead.
location.idle_body:
Enable GPS so we can find hidden
gems right around the corner.

celebration.headline: Look at you go.
celebration.body: Four quick picks and you're done.

manual_location.headline: Drop your pin on the map
manual_location.body: Give us your exact address — down to the street — and we'll unlock the best spots around you.
manual_location.no_results: Hmm, we didn't catch that. Try a nearby street or neighborhood.
manual_location.helper: The more precise, the better your recommendations.
manual_location.privacy: Your exact location stays between us. Always.

categories.headline: What kind of places do you love?
categories.body: Pick up to 3 that match your vibe.
categories.cap_message: Maximum 3 categories. Deselect one to choose another.

budget.headline: Your sweet spot
budget.body: Pick the price ranges that work.
budget.caption: Free stuff always shows up too.

transport.headline: How do you get around?
transport.body: Helps us nail the travel times.

travel_time.headline: How far will you go?
travel_time.caption: Up to {{minutes}} min by {{mode}}
travel_time.error: Couldn't save your preferences. Tap Retry to try again.

friends.headline: Your inner circle
friends.body: Add your closest people, then pair up. You'll discover things to do together, see what they love, and plan the good stuff side by side.
friends.empty_state: No friends here yet. Add someone you'd actually make plans with.
friends.pair_curated: See experiences curated for both of you.
friends.alert_self_message: You can't add yourself as a friend.
friends.alert_duplicate_message: This person is already in your list.
friends.alert_accept_error: Couldn't accept the pair request. Try again.
friends.alert_decline_error: Couldn't decline the pair request. Try again.
friends.alert_generic_error: Couldn't process the request. Try again.
friends.share_message: Hey! Join me on Mingla and let's find amazing experiences together. https://usemingla.com

collaborations.headline: Plan something together
collaborations.body: Start a session with your crew. Discover things to do, vote on favorites, and actually make it happen.
collaborations.session_name_placeholder: e.g. Weekend plans, Date night ideas...
collaborations.generic_error: Hmm, that didn't work. Give it another go.
collaborations.empty_state: Add friends first — then you can start planning together.

consent.headline: One quick thing
consent.body: Mingla uses what you've shared — your tastes, your vibe, your location — to find experiences you'll genuinely love. Your data stays yours. We never sell it, and you can delete it anytime.
